_comment: Lake generates the real lockfile by resolving the `require mathlib ... @ "v4.15.0"`
directive in lakefile.lean. The operator MUST run `lake update` once on a
machine with Lean 4 (v4.15.0) installed to populate this file with the
concrete commit hashes of mathlib + its transitive deps (std4, aesop, Qq,
After `lake update` succeeds, the manifest will be overwritten with a real
Commit the populated lake-manifest.json so other operators get reproducible builds.
name: scribe-roundtrip
